Operator.title: Operator
Operator.description: Operator profile containing normalized machine name, profile photo, lock status and last update timestamp

mesin.description: Normalized machine ID (e.g. BS 1, BS 2, Pony A)

locked.description: Lock status of the operator's photo to prevent overwrite

updatedAt.description: The exact date and time the profile was last synchronized

/operators/{operatorId}.description: Stores operator public profiles, avatars, and custom photo-locking status
